---
title: "Fundermentals of R"
subtitle: '3.0 Conditional Statements'
author: "Prepared By Clinton Moshe Mwachia"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}

```

## Including Plots

```{r}

```
